spans.content: Fit the current transformers to a metal plate with four
screws so that the cables to the motor can easily be
taken through the transformers. See dimensional
Note: The current transformers must be fitted in the
For a three-phase installation, three current trans-
Take each phase to the motor through a current
Connect the secondary side of each current trans-
former to a wire and take the wire five times through
the I1, I2 and I3 of the MP 204, see figs. 1 and 2.
Note: The three current transformers must be fitted
in the same direction and connected in the same
Fig. 2 Five windings through the MP 204
When the current transformers are used together
with an MP 204 and the installation is made as
shown in figs. 1 and 2, the actual current transformer
factor must be set in the MP 204 with the Grundfos
R100 remote control. See table on page 54.
Set the current transformer factor in menu
For further settings, see installation and operating
